task_completion.description: The Sales Team name is set to 'Direct Sales'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text input field (usually at the top of the form) labeled 'Sales Team' or similar containing the exact text 'Direct Sales'.

task_completion.description: The Team Leader is set to 'Mitchell Admin'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a field labeled 'Team Leader' with 'Mitchell Admin' selected or entered.

task_completion.description: The Email Alias is configured as 'direct-sales'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a field labeled 'Email Alias' containing the text 'direct-sales'.

task_completion.description: The policy to accept emails is set to 'Everyone'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a dropdown or selection field labeled 'Accept Emails From' that is set to 'Everyone'.

task_completion.description: The new Sales Team configuration is saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for indicators that the record has been saved, such as the form switching from edit mode to read-only mode (e.g., 'Save' button disappears, replaced by 'Edit' or 'New' buttons), or the 'Direct Sales' team appearing in the main Sales Teams list/dashboard.

integrity.description: The agent used the Odoo web GUI to configure the sales team.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Odoo interface, not a terminal or API client executing scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Odoo CRM/Sales application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard Odoo UI elements like the top navigation bar, CRM/Sales module menus, and standard Odoo form layouts.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the expected answers into a text editor or dummy page.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs must be entered into the specific Odoo Sales Team creation form fields, not a generic text document or console.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target team name is 'Direct Sales'. Expected email alias is 'direct-sales'. The policy for accepting emails must be set to 'Everyone' (most permissive). The team leader must be 'Mitchell Admin' (the default admin user in Odoo 17).
